creator: DtxdF@disroot.org
text:
Created attachment 242524
rustypaste-0.10.0.patch

Description:

ChangeLog: https://github.com/orhun/rustypaste/blob/v0.10.0/CHANGELOG.md

* Support one shot URLs
* Allow configuring the content type for the landing page
* Add information/example about using HTML forms
* An informative log message is added for showing the server address at
  startup

QA:

* portlint:
  - WARN: Makefile: possible use of absolute pathname "/var/db/${PORTNAME}".
* testport: OK (poudriere: 13.2-RELEASE, amd64, SHUTTLE OPENSSL RUSTLS tested)
